title: Parsing failed due to real constant problem
body:
Consider the following piece of code:

module top  ( var_ae, var_ab, var_ac ); 
input var_ae ; 
    input var_ab ; 
    output reg var_ac ; 
   
    always @( *) 
      if ( var_ab ) 
      var_ac  <= var_ae >= 1.0; 
 endmodule 


Run with yosys version

osys 0.15 (git sha1 UNKNOWN, gcc 9.4.0-1ubuntu1~20.04 -fPIC -Os)


when" read_verilog test.v",Parsing failed.

yosys> read_verilog my_test.v
1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: my_test.v
Parsing Verilog input from `my_test.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\top'.
my_test.v:8: Warning: converting real value 1.000000e+00 to binary 1.
Successfully finished Verilog frontend.
ERROR: Found error in internal cell \top.$ge$my_test.v:8$2 ($ge) at kernel/rtlil.cc:1076:
  attribute \src "my_test.v:8.18-8.31"
  cell $ge $ge$my_test.v:8$2
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 1
    parameter \B_WIDTH 32
    parameter \A_WIDTH 1
    parameter \B_SIGNED 1
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    connect \Y $ge$my_test.v:8$2_Y
    connect \B 1
    connect \A \var_ae
  end
